dsl_rule.translation_notes: Bullish Belt Hold pattern conditions: (1) Falling price trend approximated as price below SMA_20 and SMA_20 below SMA_50 (downtrend); (2) Open at low of day; (3) Price climbs and closes near high approximated as close > open with large body_pct (>0.7 = tall white candle). Exit when price closes below SMA_20 indicating trend reversal. Success rates 71% in both bull and bear markets are noted but not actionable as conditions. Hold period set to 10 days as reasonable default.

backtest_rule.reason: Bullish Belt Hold pattern conditions: (1) Falling price trend approximated as price below SMA_20 and SMA_20 below SMA_50 (downtrend); (2) Open at low of day; (3) Price climbs and closes near high approximated as close > open with large body_pct (>0.7 = tall white candle). Exit when price closes below SMA_20 indicating trend reversal. Success rates 71% in both bull and bear markets are noted but not actionable as conditions. Hold period set to 10 days as reasonable default.

source_rule_text: Bullish Belt Hold: A candlestick pattern in a downtrend where price opens at the low for the day and climbs, forming a tall white candle when price closes near the high
